title: nitrophila australis
intro: Nitrophila australis, also known as the saltbush or coastal nitrophila, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The health benefits of nitrophila australis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and act as an antioxidant, which can help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Nitrophila australis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical cream or ointment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
